---
title: "Cluster Analysis - Cluster Profiles"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

```{r}
# ===== PREPARE DATA =====
# Add cluster assignments to your data
data_clustered <- results_clus_k5d4$odata %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(results_clus_k5d4$cluster))

# Create cluster profiles
cluster_profiles <- data_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n/sum(n)*100, 1))

# ===== VISUALIZATIONS =====

# 1. Cluster sizes
library(ggplot2)
p1 <- ggplot(cluster_profiles, aes(x = reorder(factor(cluster), -n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n, "\n(", pct, "%)")), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Accident Distribution Across 5 Clusters (ClusPCAmix)",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Number of Accidents") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0))
print(p1)

# 2. Silhouette plot (you already have this with fviz_silhouette)
fviz_silhouette(sil_clus_k5d4, 
                palette = "jco",
                ggtheme = theme_minimal()) +
  labs(title = "Silhouette Plot (k=5, d=4)")

# 3. Cluster composition by natural light
p2 <- data_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster, natural_light) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(pct = n/sum(n)*100) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cluster), y = pct, fill = natural_light)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Natural Light Conditions by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Percentage", fill = "Light") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")
print(p2)

# 4. Cluster composition by time segment
p3 <- data_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster, time_segment) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(pct = n/sum(n)*100) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cluster), y = pct, fill = factor(time_segment))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Time Segment by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Percentage", fill = "Time") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")
print(p3)

# 5. Cluster composition by road conditions
p4 <- data_clustered %>%
  group_by(cluster, road_conditions_bin) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(pct = n/sum(n)*100) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cluster), y = pct, fill = factor(road_conditions_bin))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Road Conditions by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Percentage", fill = "Road") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")
print(p4)

# 6. Weather profiles by cluster (using pivot_longer for faceted view)
weather_long <- data_clustered %>%
  select(cluster, temp_celsius, precipitation_winsorized, 
         wind_gusts_winsorized, humidity_percent, dry_spells_winsorized) %>%
  pivot_longer(-cluster, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

p5 <- ggplot(weather_long, aes(x = factor(cluster), y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = factor(cluster))) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(title = "Weather Conditions by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Value") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
print(p5)

# 7. Individual weather variable plots (alternative to faceted view)
library(patchwork)

pw1 <- ggplot(data_clustered, aes(x = cluster, y = temp_celsius, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(title = "Temperature", y = "°C") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

pw2 <- ggplot(data_clustered, aes(x = cluster, y = humidity_percent, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(title = "Humidity", y = "%") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

pw3 <- ggplot(data_clustered, aes(x = cluster, y = wind_gusts_winsorized, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(title = "Wind Gusts", y = "km/h") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

pw4 <- ggplot(data_clustered, aes(x = cluster, y = precipitation_winsorized, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(title = "Precipitation", y = "mm") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

(pw1 + pw2) / (pw3 + pw4) + 
  plot_annotation(title = "Weather Variables by Cluster")

# ===== CLUSTER QUALITY METRICS =====
cat("\n=== CLUSTER QUALITY METRICS (k=5, d=4) ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Average Silhouette Width: %.4f\n", mean(sil_clus_k5d4[, 3])))
cat(sprintf("Calinski-Harabasz Index: %.2f\n", stats_clus_k5d4$ch))
cat(sprintf("Dunn Index: %.4f\n", stats_clus_k5d4$dunn))
cat(sprintf("Davies-Bouldin Index: %.4f\n", db_clus_k5d4))

cat("\nSilhouette Width by Cluster:\n")
sil_summary <- summary(sil_clus_k5d4)
print(sil_summary$clus.avg.widths)

cat("\nCluster with lowest quality: ", 
    which.min(sil_summary$clus.avg.widths), 
    " (Sil=", round(min(sil_summary$clus.avg.widths), 4), ")\n")
cat("Cluster with highest quality: ", 
    which.max(sil_summary$clus.avg.widths), 
    " (Sil=", round(max(sil_summary$clus.avg.widths), 4), ")\n")

# Number of poorly clustered observations
poorly_clustered <- sum(sil_clus_k5d4[, 3] < 0)
cat(sprintf("\nPoorly clustered accidents: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
            poorly_clustered, poorly_clustered/nrow(data_clustered)*100))

# Cluster sizes
cat("\nCluster Sizes:\n")
print(cluster_profiles)

# ===== SAVE RESULTS =====
cat("\n=== SAVING RESULTS ===\n")

# Save the clustered data
write.csv(data_clustered, "accidents_clustered_k5d4.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: accidents_clustered_k5d4.csv\n")

# Save cluster profiles
write.csv(cluster_profiles, "cluster_profiles_k5d4.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: cluster_profiles_k5d4.csv\n")

# Save clustering info
clustering_info <- list(
  method = "ClusPCAmix_mixedRKM",
  k = 5,
  ndim = 4,
  silhouette_avg = mean(sil_clus_k5d4[, 3]),
  ch_index = stats_clus_k5d4$ch,
  dunn_index = stats_clus_k5d4$dunn,
  db_index = db_clus_k5d4,
  cluster_sizes = table(data_clustered$cluster),
  cluster_assignments = results_clus_k5d4$cluster
)
saveRDS(clustering_info, "clustering_info_k5d4.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: clustering_info_k5d4.rds\n")

# Save the full results object
saveRDS(results_clus_k5d4, "cluspcamix_results_k5d4.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: cluspcamix_results_k5d4.rds\n")

cat("\n=== CLUSTERING VISUALIZATION COMPLETE! ===\n")
```

FOR ALL ACCIDENTS:

```{r}

```
